name: uikit-workspace
description: @dreamlake/uikit workspace — UI primitives + Vike/MDX doc site

scripts.prod: pnpm version-branch && git push -f origin HEAD:netlify-production

pnpm.//: Pin to single versions. react/react-dom match the outer workspace's 19.2.4 override so the nested docs install can't resolve a mismatched React copy across the workspace boundary (which crashed lucide's useContext during SSR). lucide-react is deduped to one version (the uikit lib needs >=1.0.0).
